channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dutch Legal Case Could Threaten US Energy Security
item.description: A risky attempt to reverse course.

item.title: The Fourth of July Celebrates Life
item.description: It also serves as a reminder of our duties.

item.title: Europe's Deadly Reluctance to Use Air Conditioning
item.description: Heat-related illnesses caused an estimated 24,400 deaths in Europe's urban areas in 2025.

item.title: England's Proposed Conversion Practices Ban Is Flawed
item.description: This bill resembles a long-lost chapter from 1984.
